calendar.matters:
Petition Re: Administration Of Trust By Trustee And Objections To The Same
Off Calendar Jan-28-2013 Off Calendar

Petition Re: Administration Of Trust By Trustee And Objections To The Same
Off Calendar Oct-15-2012 Continued To Jan-28-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Rothman for Maryanne Stewart. Walter Cook for John Stewart.

Counsel informed the Court that agreed to mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than January 15, 2013. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by January 22, 2013. The Petition Re: Administration of Trust and Objections to The Same was continued to and the Parties are to return on January 28, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Counsel is to file a declaration regarding the issue of no other Heirs being entitled to notice and due diligence prior to the next hearing date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
